log.context:
Done. Summary:

- SQLite version: 3.45.1 (ALTER TABLE DROP COLUMN supported)
- There was an index `idx_tasks_archived` on the column that had to be dropped first before the column could be removed
- Dropped `idx_tasks_archived`, then dropped the `archived` column via ALTER TABLE
- Final schema: `id, title, status, created_at, updated_at, data` — `archived` is gone
- Committed and pushed to GitHub (commit `eb3c81d`)
